title: ayenia stenophylla
intro: Ayenia stenophylla, also known as the 'small-leaved ayenia', is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia stenophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Ayenia stenophylla is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine.
